name: Verisk Analytics
analysis: VRSK has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 41% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $184.4200, stop $167.8248, target $207.4900 (1.39:1) — then trail it.
